step.title: Load story and architecture
step.action: Read the story file and relevant architecture documents to understand requirements and constraints.

step.title: Plan implementation approach
step.action: Outline the implementation approach: files to create/modify, patterns to follow, edge cases to handle.

step.title: Write failing tests
step.action: Write tests for all acceptance criteria. Verify they fail before implementation (TDD red phase).

step.title: Implement code
step.action: Write the implementation code to make all tests pass (TDD green phase).

step.title: Run tests
step.action: Run the full test suite to verify all tests pass and no regressions are introduced.

step.title: Self-review
step.action: Review your own code for correctness, patterns adherence, edge cases, and code quality.

step.title: Commit
step.action: Commit the implementation with a descriptive message referencing the story ID.
